title: Rollback MR-01 Stop Bad Facts Evidence

scope.technical_rollback_allowed_when: MR-01 has produced only guard evidence and has not carried production release decisions.
scope.evidence_retention_required_when: GateResult, ReleaseManifest, RuntimeInvariantCheck, or test evidence rows have been referenced by later release decisions.

steps: Stop using MR-01 evidence for promotion decisions.
Keep runtime behavior unchanged; MR-01 rollback is evidence rollback only.
Regenerate fake fallback, confirm semantics, field validation, no-side-effects, outbox, and gate evidence from the current commit.
If MR-01 evidence was never referenced downstream, archive or supersede only the MR-01 ReleaseManifest and GateResult evidence.
If downstream release decisions referenced MR-01 evidence, preserve the original rows and issue a compensating ReleaseManifest that supersedes MR-01.
validation_steps: Confirm no active release manifest depends on gate-mr-01-stop-bad-facts.
Confirm replacement evidence includes non-skeleton command/test outputs for every MR-01 Go criterion.
Run release-manifest-validate against the replacement manifest, generated GateResult, and this rollback instruction.
Confirm GateResult.generated_by is gate-runner and input_hash/result_hash are non-empty.
